name: attention-diff
description: Render GitHub PR diffs with AI-scored attention heatmaps.

interface.shortDescription: Render PR diffs with AI-scored attention heatmaps.
interface.longDescription: Attention Diff prepares GitHub PR diff artifacts, asks Codex or Claude Code to write attention scores and reasons, validates the JSON, and serves a local diff heatmap viewer.
defaultPrompt: Show this PR as an attention diff
